reasoning: Virgin Galactic reported around $867 million in cash and short-term investments in early 2024. With VSS Unity retired, operations are fully focused on developing the Delta-class ships, creating a predictable annual cash burn of roughly $400-450 million. This cash pile is projected to bridge operations into 2026. Furthermore, major debt maturities (like the convertible notes) are not due until 2027. Consequently, while long-term solvency remains uncertain, the risk of a Chapter 11 filing specifically before January 1, 2026 is relatively low. I predict 10%.
